algorithm: Novel algorithm: The algorithm selects the next node by prioritizing unvisited nodes that are closest to the current node but not the destination node, breaking ties by choosing the node with the smallest index.

Our algorithm selects the next node based on the maximum difference between the shortest distance from the current node to each unvisited node and the second shortest distance between them, ensuring a diverse exploration of the unvisited nodes.

The algorithm selects the next node by choosing the unvisited node with the minimum product of the distances to the current node and the destination node, breaking ties by selecting the node with the smallest index.

Design a novel algorithm that selects the next unvisited node with the shortest distance from the current node, while also considering the distance to the destination node, and the distance between the unvisited nodes themselves.

Our new algorithm selects the next node based on the minimum ratio of the shortest distance from the current node to each unvisited node and the second-shortest distance between them, ensuring efficient exploration of the unvisited nodes.
